subcodes.first_line: O Solomon! Hearken unto the call of the Wronged One, Who summoneth thee from within the Most Great Prison purely for the sake of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سلیمان ان استمع ندآء المظلوم انه یدعوک فی السجن الاعظم خالصا لوجه الله
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @the power of words; of speech
